overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the neon-lit Seocho district of Night City. The player character walks beneath massive holographic advertisements, crosses illuminated streets with futuristic vehicle traffic, and navigates through sparse pedestrian crowds in a dense cyberpunk urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath commercial signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian zone beneath the glowing SEOCHO sign, passing holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blonde hair walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: large overhead neon sign spelling 'SEOCHO' in white letters with cyan accents
large illuminated advertisement showing a figure with text 'DYNALAR' visible
tall futuristic building with reflective glass facade and neon trim
large potted plant with green foliage in a teal planter
illuminated blue geometric patterns embedded in the concrete walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the massive glowing 'SEOCHO' neon sign. The player walks forward past a large Dynalar holographic billboard on the left and potted palm trees, with futuristic glass towers visible to the right. A pedestrian passes closely by on the right side as the camera moves steadily through the cyan-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated street intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto open street crosswalk with yellow stripes
yellow futuristic taxi drives past the crosswalk from left to right
black sedan passes by on the right side while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while navigating around other pedestrians and waiting for vehicles to pass

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic car with glowing headlights driving past the crosswalk
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with illuminated edges leading up to building entrance
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and glowing green text markings
metal barrier with yellow and black caution stripes along the street edge
tall building covered in holographic advertisements and cyan neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway and enters an open street intersection, crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk. A yellow futuristic taxi passes by on the left as the camera moves across the asphalt. The concrete staircase remains visible on the left while neon-lit skyscrapers tower on the right, and the SEOCHO sign recedes overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with crosswalk and dense neon signage

events.description: turns right onto sidewalk after completing the street crossing
turns left to face and cross the perpendicular street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, turning the corner, and crossing a second intersection with oncoming pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light blue shirt and cap crossing the street toward the camera
group of pedestrians waiting at the street corner

entered.detail: large curved digital billboard displaying purple and yellow advertisements
building facade with prominent red and cyan neon strip lighting
large yellow utility truck with illuminated cabin driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: After crossing the first street, the player turns right onto the sidewalk and walks past groups of pedestrians waiting at the corner. The camera then turns left to cross a second intersection, facing oncoming pedestrians. A large yellow truck passes through the intersection as the player navigates the crosswalk, with new holographic billboards visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered neon corridor into the bustling, open intersections of a futuristic urban district. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive glowing SEOCHO sign, moving past a Dynalar holographic billboard and potted palms while a pedestrian brushes past on the right. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide street intersection where the player crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk while a yellow futuristic taxi speeds by on the left. The movement then shifts toward the sidewalk, passing groups of waiting pedestrians before turning left to navigate a second crossing. Finally, the camera pushes through the flow of oncoming foot traffic as a large yellow truck passes and new holographic billboards illuminate the surrounding skyscrapers.
